'''Zenobah''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Demophon system/Legends|Demophon system]]. It had a hot climate and was covered in plains. It had two [[Moon/Legends|moons]],<ref name="S" /> and was [[Demophon supernova|destroyed]] when [[Demophon (star)|its sun]] went [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]].<ref name="BE">{{WEGCite|story=The Beginning of the End|book=Supernova (sourcebook)}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
